race.comment: Competitive. VELLA'S BEST (3) is a leader who has won 2/3 first-up and 2/2 this course/distance. Ran a peak winning a strong Quality here before the spell and has prepared for this with a trial win at the track. Draws well and will be tough to get past. METALLIC RULER (9) switched from a Victorian stable and disappointed at Nowra off a freshen. Was unsettled at the gates and will be tougher to beat with that under the belt. Has metro form that stacks right up and McDougall will give him every chance from the handy barrier. ONE DESTINY (2) switched yards and won a 66 first up at Newcastle. Raced forward and he's much improved. Uses the low gate and deserves consideration with the extra fitness. TAKE THE RAP (4) has won twice second-up and his best form would see him in the finish. Could surprise. SOUL LADY (11) resumes and is a betting watch.
